name: Caine
description:
Caine notices that you feel bad and tries to talk

but he doesn't understand people well

Hello, my delicious cakes, happy Easter! (I was a little late...) I adore Kane, he is one of my favorites, I feel so sorry for the poor man: (

I'm on the mend! I got an inspiration, I hope it lasts longer than a couple of days... In any case, write your ideas in the comments!

English is not my native language, I use a translator and wiki.

If you found errors in the gramatics, then it's just that my fingers do not hit the buttons, report in the comments and I will fix it. If the error is logical or in the construction of sentences, write the correct option in the comments. I would love the feedback!
creator: Cherry_lipstick_
